author: Sergey Pekarchik
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc1: - Can be placed in the world
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc2: - Use another pouch or compatible seeds to add them inside
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc3: - Each extra pouch adds 4 seeds to the storage
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc4: - Adds up to 16 pouches or 64 seeds per use (or as many as possible)
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc5: While sneaking, only 1 pouch or 1 seed item is added per use
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc6: - Holds up to 252 seeds, excluding the 4 used to craft it (equivalent to a full stack of pouches)
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc7: - Breaking it drops 4 seeds used to craft the pouch and all stored seeds
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc8: - Sneak-breaking drops the content as pouches (1 per 4 seeds), remainder (less than 4) as seeds
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc9: - Right-click with an empty hand or incompatible item to withdraw 16 seeds (or what's left)
item.pouchandpaper.pouch.desc10: While sneaking, only 1 seed item is withdrawn per use
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc1: - Can be placed in the world
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc2: - Use another sack or compatible crops to add them inside
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc3: - Each extra sack adds 4 units of crop to the storage
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc4: - Adds up to 16 sacks or 64 units per use (or as many as possible)
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc5: While sneaking, only 1 sack or 1 crop item is added per use
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc6: - Holds up to 252 units, excluding the 4 used to craft it (equivalent to a full stack of sacks)
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc7: - Breaking it drops 4 units used to craft the sack and all stored crops
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc8: - Sneak-breaking drops the content as sacks (1 per 4 units), remainder (less than 4) as crops
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc9: - Right-click with an empty hand or incompatible item to withdraw 16 units (or what's left)
item.pouchandpaper.crop_sack.desc10: While sneaking, only 1 crop item is withdrawn per use
item.pouchandpaper.paperblock.desc1: Drops paper when the block falls
item.pouchandpaper.paperblock.desc2: Burns into a Burnt Paper Block, but may burn away entirely
item.pouchandpaper.paperblock.desc3: If not burning, the Burnt Paper Block attracts creepers within 70 blocks
item.pouchandpaper.paperblock.desc4: Bees flee from the Burnt Paper Block within a 50-block radius
item.pouchandpaper.paperblock.desc5: Nothing drops when a Burnt Paper Block is broken
item.pouchandpaper.burnt_paper_block.des: Created by burning a Paper Block
If not on fire, attracts creepers within 70 blocks
Bees flee the area within a 50-block radius
No items drop when the block is broken
Cannot be harvested, even with Silk Touch tools
